overall.description: First-person exploration of the Fountain of Peirene in ancient Corinth from Assassin's Creed Odyssey. The player character walks a circular path around the sacred pool, passing classical Greek colonnades, pink flowering Judas trees, marble statues, and NPCs relaxing by the water in a sunlit courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: classical Greek fountain courtyard with temple view

events.description: information panel about Fountain of Peirene closes

agents.ego_description: walking along the left edge of the pool, approaching the stone colonnade while looking across the water at the main temple

entered.detail: large stone building with classical columns and triangular pediment
tree with bright pink blossoms near the temple
covered walkway with stone columns and blue painted bases
calm reflective water of the sacred fountain pool

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view across the Fountain of Peirene toward a grand classical temple. The camera moves left along the pool edge, passing the pink flowering tree while approaching the stone colonnade on the left. The information panel visible at the start closes shortly into the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with stone columns

events.description: enters the covered colonnade area on the left side of the pool

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded colonnade, passing between the stone columns with blue bases

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the far side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the covered colonnade walkway, passing between stone columns with distinctive blue painted bases. The lighting becomes diffused and sheltered as the camera proceeds toward the stone steps at the far end of the pool, with the main temple and pink tree now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: far side of fountain with seating area and planters

events.description: NPCs become visible sitting by the pool edge with their feet in the water

agents.ego_description: ascending the stone steps and walking along the far edge of the pool past seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting and conversing on the pool edge with their feet in the water

entered.detail: large rectangular wooden planters with flowering plants
marble statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
metal fire braziers burning near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stone steps to the far side of the courtyard, revealing wooden planters with flowers and NPCs relaxing by the pool edge. A classical marble statue and burning braziers become visible ahead as the camera moves along the back side of the fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: right side of fountain with statue and flowering tree

agents.ego_description: walking around the right side of the pool, passing the marble statue and returning to the open courtyard view

notable_agents.action: person walking near the temple entrance in the distance

entered.detail: large stone building with classical columns and triangular pediment

segments.scene_description: The camera rounds the right side of the pool, passing close to the marble statue and pink flowering tree. The main temple building comes back into view across the water as the camera completes the circuit around the fountain, returning to the open courtyard area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that circles the Fountain of Peirene, transitioning from an open sunlit courtyard into a sheltered colonnade before returning to the open air. It begins with a view across the pool toward a grand classical temple, gliding left past a pink flowering tree and toward a stone colonnade. As the camera enters the covered walkway, the lighting becomes diffused and sheltered while passing between columns with blue painted bases toward a set of stone steps. The scene then opens up as the camera ascends these steps to reveal wooden planters and relaxing NPCs, moving past burning braziers and a marble statue along the far side of the fountain. Finally, the camera rounds the right side of the pool and passes the flowering tree once more, bringing the main temple back into view as the circuit around the courtyard is completed.
